title: Incorrect result for `t_func_dotted_inl0` with `--public`
body:
Got incorrect simulation result for the test `t_func_dotted_inl0.py` when running it with `--public`.

https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/01157d414b56ee199d55e6eb956bf4f67c2f37e4/test_regress/t/t_func_dotted.v#L1-L159

https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/01157d414b56ee199d55e6eb956bf4f67c2f37e4/test_regress/t/t_func_dotted_inl0.py#L1-L38 

Output with `--public`:

```
top.t.ma0.u_b[0].f
top.t.ma0.u_b[0].f
%Error: t/t_func_dotted.v:135: Verilog $stop
Aborting...
```

Expected output: 

```
top.t.ma0.u_b[0].f
top.t.ma0.u_b[0].f
*-* All Finished *-*
- t/t_func_dotted.v:50: Verilog $finish
vlt/t_func_dotted_inl0: Self PASSED
```

Got the same error for tests:
- t_func_dotted_inl0_vlt
- t_func_dotted_inl1
- t_func_dotted_inl1_vlt
- t_func_dotted_inl2
- t_func_dotted_inl2_vlt

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?  Did you try it with other simulators?

I'm using latest master as of https://github.com/verilator/verilator/commit/01157d414b56ee199d55e6eb956bf4f67c2f37e4.
code_blocks:
top.t.ma0.u_b[0].f
top.t.ma0.u_b[0].f
%Error: t/t_func_dotted.v:135: Verilog $stop
Aborting...
top.t.ma0.u_b[0].f
top.t.ma0.u_b[0].f
*-* All Finished *-*
- t/t_func_dotted.v:50: Verilog $finish
vlt/t_func_dotted_inl0: Self PASSED
